groups.label: World War I Battles
groups.explanation: Verdun, the Somme, Gallipoli, and the Marne were all major battles of World War I.

groups.label: World War II Battles
groups.explanation: Normandy, Midway, Stalingrad, and Iwo Jima were all major battles of World War II.

groups.label: Progressive Era Reforms
groups.explanation: Women's suffrage, prohibition, trust-busting, and labor reform were all goals of the Progressive Era reform movement.

groups.label: Balkan Peninsula Nations
groups.explanation: Serbia, Bulgaria, Romania, and Greece are all nations of the Balkan Peninsula.
